# Courses You Need To Play (CYNTP)

> CYNTP is a golf travel content brand helping everyday golfers find the best courses and trips worth their time and money. Founded by Cameron Ream, Noah Miller, and Beau Jordan — three golfers who play it, rate it, and tell you the truth.

## What We Do

CYNTP provides honest golf course reviews, curated golf trip itineraries, and destination guides across the United States and internationally. We personally play every course we recommend. No PR fluff, no paid placements — just real takes from people who love the game.

## Our Content

- [Golf Trips](https://www.coursesyouneedtoplay.com/cyntp-trips.html): Curated multi-day golf trip itineraries with pricing, course lineups, and honest reviews. Destinations include Scottsdale, Myrtle Beach, Hilton Head, Las Vegas, Palm Springs, Williamsburg, St. George, Orlando, and Miami.
- [Course Directory](https://www.coursesyouneedtoplay.com/cyntp-courses.html): 107+ golf courses reviewed across 19 destinations including Alabama, Arizona, California, Florida, Georgia, Idaho, Ireland, Kentucky, Michigan, Mississippi, Missouri, South Carolina, Tennessee, Texas, Utah, Virginia, Washington, and Wisconsin.
- [The Turn](https://www.coursesyouneedtoplay.com/cyntp-turn.html): Golf travel articles, trip guides, and course reviews published regularly.
- [About](https://www.coursesyouneedtoplay.com/cyntp-about.html): Who we are and how we work.
- [Partner](https://www.coursesyouneedtoplay.com/cyntp-partner.html): Brand and resort partnership information.

## Who We Serve

Everyday golfers — typically the trip organizer in a friend group — who want honest recommendations on where to play, what to pay, and whether a trip is worth it. Our audience of 301K+ followers actively plans and books golf trips using our content.

## Key Topics We Cover

- Best golf trips by destination (Scottsdale, Hilton Head, Myrtle Beach, Las Vegas, Palm Springs, etc.)
- Golf course reviews by state
- Golf trip itineraries and pricing
- Stay & play golf resort reviews
- Budget-conscious golf travel
- Public golf course recommendations
